'''Nalros''' was a yellow [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Celanon system/Legends|Celanon system]],<ref name="PoG1" /><ref name="TSWPC" /> located in the [[D'Astan sector/Legends|D'Astan sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by a single [[Planet/Legends|planet]], the trading and agricultural world of [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]].<ref name="PoG1" /><ref name="TSWPC" />
